testcase.name: TestHandleReadinessWhenNotNotified
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:pg] Listening on 127.0.0.1:9000 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [Health Check] Readiness failed: proxy is not started

testcase.name: TestHandleReadinessWhenStopped
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:pg] Listening on 127.0.0.1:9000 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [Health Check] Readiness failed: proxy has stopped

testcase.name: TestHandleReadinessForMaxConns
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:pg] Listening on 127.0.0.1:9000 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:pg] Accepted connection from 127.0.0.1:56312 2026/04/09 17:56:34 [Health Check] Readiness failed: max connections reached (open = 1, max = 1)

testsuite.name: github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-sql-proxy/v2/internal/proxy

testcase.name: TestFUSEDialInstance/mysql_connections_create_a_Unix_socket
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:region:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:mysql] Accepted connection from @ 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:mysql] client closed the connection 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:region:mysql": accept unix /tmp/2300171611/proj:region:mysql: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestFUSEDialInstance/postgres_connections_create_a_directory_with_a_special_file
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:region:pg" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:pg] Accepted connection from @ 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:pg] client closed the connection 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:region:pg": accept unix /tmp/2300171611/proj:region:pg/.s.PGSQL.5432: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestFUSEDialInstance/connecting_creates_intermediate_temp_directories
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:region:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:mysql] Accepted connection from @ 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:mysql] client closed the connection 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:region:mysql": accept unix /tmp/2300171611/doesntexist/proj:region:mysql: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestFUSEAcceptErrorReturnedFromServe
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:region:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:region:mysql] Accepted connection from @ 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:region:mysql": accept unix /tmp/3779600590/proj:region:mysql: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestFUSEReadDir
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:reg:mysql] Accepted connection from @ 2026/04/09 17:56:33 found existing socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:reg:mysql] client closed the connection 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql": accept unix /tmp/1102495026/proj:reg:mysql: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestLookupIgnoresContext
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql": accept unix /tmp/3514071802/proj:reg:mysql: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestFUSEErrors
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql": accept unix /tmp/552615626/proj:reg:mysql: use of closed network connection 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql"

testcase.name: TestFUSEWithBadInstanceName
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not parse instance connection name for "notvalid": invalid instance connection name, want = PROJECT:REGION:INSTANCE, got = notvalid

testcase.name: TestFUSECheckConnections
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 creating new socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql" 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:reg:mysql] Accepted connection from @ 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:reg:mysql] client closed the connection 2026/04/09 17:56:33 could not serve socket for instance "proj:reg:mysql": accept unix /tmp/4103895233/proj:reg:mysql: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestFUSEWithBadDir
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [proj:reg:mysql] client closed the connection

testcase.name: TestFuseClosesGracefully
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Authorizing with OAuth2 token

testcase.name: TestClientLimitsMaxConnections

testsuite.name: github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-sql-proxy/v2/cmd

testcase.name: TestSdNotifyOnLinux/System_with_systemd_Type=notify_and_proxy_started_successfully
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:44331 2026/04/09 17:56:33 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections!

testcase.name: TestSdNotifyOnLinux/System_with_systemd_Type=notify_and_proxy_failed_to_start
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Error starting proxy: stat invalid: no such file or directory 2026/04/09 17:56:33 The proxy has encountered a terminal error: unable to start: stat invalid: no such file or directory 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown. 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown. 2026/04/09 17:56:33 SIGINT signal received. Shutting down...

testcase.name: TestNewCommandWithEnvironmentConfig/using_the_disable_traces_envvar

testcase.name: TestNewCommandWithEnvironmentConfig/using_the_disable_metrics_envvar
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Ignoring --disable-metrics because --telemetry-project was not set

testcase.name: TestNewCommandWithEnvironmentConfig/using_the_telemetry_prefix_envvar
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Ignoring --telementry-prefix because --telemetry-project was not set

testcase.name: TestNewCommandWithEnvironmentConfig/using_the_http_port_envvar
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 Ignoring --http-port because --prometheus or --health-check was not set

testcase.name: TestCommandWithCustomDialer
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:36813 2026/04/09 17:56:33 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections! 2026/04/09 17:56:34 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown. 2026/04/09 17:56:34 SIGINT signal received. Shutting down... 2026/04/09 17:56:34 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:36813: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestPrometheusMetricsEndpoint
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:34 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:41149 2026/04/09 17:56:34 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections! 2026/04/09 17:56:35 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown.

testcase.name: TestPProfServer
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:35 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:41149: use of closed network connection 2026/04/09 17:56:35 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:33869 2026/04/09 17:56:35 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections! 2026/04/09 17:56:35 Enabling pprof endpoints at localhost:9191

testcase.name: TestQuitQuitQuitHTTPPost
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:36 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:33869: use of closed network connection 2026/04/09 17:56:36 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:45725 2026/04/09 17:56:36 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections! 2026/04/09 17:56:36 Enabling quitquitquit endpoint at localhost:9192 2026/04/09 17:56:37 /quitquitquit received request. Shutting down... 2026/04/09 17:56:37 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown.

testcase.name: TestQuitQuitQuitHTTPGet
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:37 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:40327 2026/04/09 17:56:37 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections! 2026/04/09 17:56:37 Enabling quitquitquit endpoint at localhost:9194 2026/04/09 17:56:38 /quitquitquit received request. Shutting down... 2026/04/09 17:56:38 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown. 2026/04/09 17:56:38 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:40327: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestQuitQuitQuitWithErrors
testcase.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:38 [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Listening on 127.0.0.1:33205 2026/04/09 17:56:38 The proxy has started successfully and is ready for new connections! 2026/04/09 17:56:38 Enabling quitquitquit endpoint at localhost:9193 2026/04/09 17:56:39 /quitquitquit received request. Shutting down... 2026/04/09 17:56:39 error during shutdown: close failed 2026/04/09 17:56:39 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:33205: use of closed network connection 2026/04/09 17:56:39 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown.

testsuite.system-out: 2026/04/09 17:56:33 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:44331: use of closed network connection 2026/04/09 17:56:35 SIGINT signal received. Shutting down... 2026/04/09 17:56:36 Sending SIGINT signal for proxy to shutdown. 2026/04/09 17:56:36 SIGINT signal received. Shutting down... 2026/04/09 17:56:37 proxy server error: accept tcp 127.0.0.1:45725: use of closed network connection
